data.name: Anime Ascendants
data.description: Redeem these Anime Ascendants codes for new Unit Summons, Trait Rerolls, and more, and your enemies won't stand a chance.

list_code.description_code: 40x Magic Tokens, 5,000x Gems, 5x Stat Cubes, 5x Perfect Stat Cubes
35x Magic Tokens, 5,000x Gems, 2,500x Coins, 5x Stat Cubes, 5x Perfect Stat Cubes; level three required
15,000x April Fools Coins, 25x Magic Tokens; level three required
15,000x April Fools Coins, 25x Magic Tokens; level 3 required

data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem Anime Ascendants codes, go to the main lobby area, click the Codes button on the right-hand side of the screen, enter the code, and click Redeem.

data.name: Anime Reversal
data.description: Codes for Anime Reversal will give you plenty of Gems and Rerolls to spend in this tower defense sim.
data.description_guide_add_code: Before redeeming Anime Reversal codes, join the XTS Production community group from the Roblox menu and reach Level 2+. Then use the in-game code redemption option to enter and claim codes.

data.name: Rogue Piece
data.description: Codes for Rogue Piece give you Gems, Potions, and Reroll Shards, alongside Dungeon Tokens and Tickets plus fresh Titles.

list_code.description_code: 155,000x Fragments of Rogue, 1,250x Clan Rerolls, 30x Holy Grails, 15x Rogue's Blessings
25,000x Gems, 25,000x Fragments of Rogue, 1x Mythical Box

data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem Rogue Piece codes, hit the Setting Cog icon on the left side of the screen to open the Setting menu. Scroll down to the Misc section at the bottom, enter each promo in the text box, then tap Enter. Codes are case-sensitive.

data.name: Fisch
data.description: Codes for Fisch in Roblox will unlock plenty of useful items that will help you in this angling adventure.

list_code.description_code: Back Fins, Metal Panels, Side Fins, Submarine Top, and Windows

data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem Fisch codes, hit the Menu button at the top of the screen to open the settings, scroll to the bottom to find the Codes section, tap the Type Code Here text box, enter the promo, and press Enter to claim it.

data.name: Build a Zoo
data.description: Codes for Build a Zoo will get you Eggs to hatch into animals, along with Lucky Tickets for free spins and plenty of cash to spend.
data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem Build a Zoo codes, tap the Shop icon on the left side of the screen to open the Shop menu. Scroll down to the Redemption Code section, enter the promo in the Enter Code text box, then hit Redeem.

data.name: Bizarre Lineage
data.description: Codes for Bizarre Lineage are finally here, but you'll need access to chat to redeem them.
data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem codes in Bizarre Lineage, first join the Bizarre Collective community from the Roblox page for the experience and hit Join Community. You must also Like the game before redeeming.

data.name: Fruit Piece Incremental
data.description: Codes for Fruit Piece Incremental unlock cash to spend, along with various scrolls and rolls to boost your character.

list_code.description_code: 20,000x Beli, 4x Haki Scrolls, 5x Devil Fruit Rolls, 5x Fighting Style Rolls, 5x Bloodline Scrolls

data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem Fruit Piece Incremental codes, hit the Shopping Cart icon. This may be along the top bar or inside the menu opened via the three bar icon. Open the Premium Shop menu, scroll to the bottom, enter the promo into the Enter code... text box, and hit Redeem.

data.name: Fruit Battlegrounds
data.description: Codes for Fruit Battlegrounds will give you a stash of Gems so you can spin for new fruits.

list_code.description_code: 8,500 Gems, One in a Billion Title

data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem Fruit Battlegrounds codes, select the Spin Fruit option from the main menu, then tap the chest with SPIN hovering above it. In the bottom left corner, enter the code in the Enter Code Here... text box and hit Redeem. Codes are case-sensitive.

data.name: Sol's RNG
data.description: Codes for Sol's RNG unlock Coins and Potions to increase your chances of rolling rare auras.
data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem Sol's RNG codes, tap the Menu icon with three horizontal lines on the left side of the screen, choose Settings, select Miscellaneous at the top of the Settings screen, then hit Open beside Redeem Code to show the text box. Codes are case-sensitive.

data.name: Sorcerer Ascent
data.description: If you want to reroll your Cursed Energy color or stock up on Soul Points then redeem these Sorcerer Ascent codes.
data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem Sorcerer Ascent codes, select Abilities from the main menu. If you are already in-game, return to the main menu using the button in the top left corner. From the abilities menu, enter the code in the box at the top and hit enter. You need to reach level 15 before redeeming codes.

data.name: Steal a Brainrot
data.description: There are currently no Steal a Brainrot codes available in Roblox, but they could be added in the future.
data.description_guide_add_code: At the time of writing, there are currently no general Steal a Brainrot codes available. GamesRadar notes that an in-game code redemption system now exists within the Shop menu, but no public active codes are available yet.

data.name: Subterra
data.description: These Subterra codes grant you a variety of rewards including currency and items.

list_code.description_code: 32x TNT Blocks, Double EXP for 1 hour

data.description_guide_add_code: You can only redeem Subterra codes on the surface. Head to the Codes NPC on the right of the bridge, just behind the mines entrance. When you enter the NPC radius, the redemption box appears automatically. Enter the code exactly as shown and click Claim Code.

data.name: Superstar Baseball
data.description: Reward codes for Superstar Baseball provide plenty of free spins, which can be used to unlock new Offensive and Defensive Styles.
data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem Superstar Baseball codes, tap the Settings Cog icon in the bottom left corner of the screen, then scroll down to the bottom of the Settings menu. Use the Enter a Reward Code text box, type the promo, then hit the Redeem button. Codes are case-sensitive.

data.name: Solo Hunters
data.description: Codes for Solo Hunters will give you plenty of Gems and Rerolls, but you need to find a specific NPC to claim them.

list_code.description_code: 3 Demon Castle Tickets, Stat Reset, Class Reroll

data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem Solo Hunters codes, complete the brief tutorial to reach the Overground area. Then find the marked NPC near the docks and crane. Approach the blue NPC wearing a red hat and interact to open the Codes screen. Enter the code into the Type Code Here box and hit Redeem. Codes are not case-sensitive.

data.name: Raise Animals
data.description: Codes for Raise Animals will boost your in-game currencies, to spend on Food, Lasso gacha pulls, and unlocking map regions.
data.description_guide_add_code: Before you can redeem Raise Animals codes, join the Raise Animals Studio group from the Roblox experience page. Then enter the game, hit the Cog icon in the top right corner to open Settings, scroll to the bottom to find the Redeem Code box, type the code where it says Code Here..., and tap Redeem. Codes are case-sensitive.

data.name: Punch Wall
data.description: Codes for Punch Wall can be used to collect free Coins Potions to increase your cash, so you can buy new Gloves and Pets.
data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem Punch Wall codes, hit the Cog icon in the top right corner of the screen to open the Setting menu. Under the Music and SFX sliders, use the Code text box to enter the promo, then press OK. Codes are case-sensitive.

data.name: Project Egoist
data.description: Codes for Project Egoist will give you a chunk of Yen to make purchases with, as well as unlocking customization items.
data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem Project Egoist codes, first join the Cool group for big cool people community from the Roblox main menu. Then tap the Codes ticket icon at the bottom of the main screen to open Rewards, enter the code in the Redeem here! box, and press the green Redeem button. Codes are not case-sensitive.

data.name: Anime Eternal
data.description: There are many codes for Anime Eternal that you can redeem right now to stock up on Credits, Potions, Crystals, and other resources.
data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem Anime Eternal codes, tap the Shop basket icon on the left side of the screen, scroll down the Shop menu to the Redeem Codes section at the bottom, enter the promo, and hit Redeem. Codes are not case-sensitive, but punctuation such as ! or ? must be included where shown.

data.name: Anime Defenders
data.description: Redeem these Anime Defenders codes in Roblox and stock up on resources to aid your tower defense.
data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem Anime Defenders codes, join a session, select the '...' button at the top of the screen, then choose Codes from the menu. Enter the promo in the Enter Code Here box and press the blue Redeem button. Your character must be Level 8 and your account must be 90 days old before redeeming codes.

data.name: Abyss
data.description: Codes for Abyss will help you in this deep sea fishing adventure, with Star Shards to spend on Rerolls and various boosts.
data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem Abyss codes in Roblox, complete the brief tutorial by introducing yourself to the Kraken and catching three fish. Then tap the Cog icon near the top left, scroll down to the Codes section, enter the promo in the Enter code... text box, and hit the green Redeem button. Codes are case-sensitive.

data.name: Wanted
data.description: Codes for Wanted will give your bank balance a boost and equip you with several new weapons.
data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem Wanted codes, first join the official Discord server and use Bloxlink verification to link your account. Then hit MENU in-game, select the SHOP tab, go to the CODES section, and type the promos into the text box. Codes are not case-sensitive, but there is a short cooldown between multiple redemptions.

data.name: Soccer Zero
data.description: Codes for Soccer Zero are now available as the game has launched, and this is how to redeem them.
data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem Soccer Zero codes, hit the purple gift Codes icon along the bottom row of options on the main game screen. Enter the promo in the text box. You must join developer Current's Roblox group to use the codes.

data.name: Waste Time
data.description: Codes for Waste Time will give you bonus Locks, Rerolls, and stat boosts to speed up your journey through time.
data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem Waste Time codes, tap the Codes button on the left side of the screen to open the code redemption window, enter the promo code into the text box, and submit it to claim the reward. At the time checked, the article notes that no active Waste Time codes are currently available.

data.name: Weak Legacy 2
data.description: Codes for Weak Legacy 2 give you extra spins to reroll and potions that provide various boosts.
data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem Weak Legacy 2 codes, open the game menu, find the Codes option, enter the code into the redemption box, and confirm to claim the rewards. Some codes may require progress or specific conditions before they work.

data.name: The Forge
data.description: Codes for The Forge will let you reroll your stats and boost your mining abilities.
data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem The Forge codes, open the in-game menu, go to the Codes or redemption section, enter the active promo code, and submit it to claim rerolls or other rewards.

data.name: You vs Homer
data.description: YVH codes will give you enough in-game currency to buy some new Bart and Homer skins.
data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem You vs Homer codes, open the code redemption option in the game, enter the active promo code, and submit it to receive Quidz, Eggs, or other rewards.

data.name: Universal Tower Defense X
data.description: These Universal Tower Defense codes provide you with stacks of Gems to spend and many Rerolls to improve your RNG.

list_code.description_code: 2x Universal Fragment, 2x Sky Fragment, 2x Frozen Fragment, 2x Burning Fragments, 2x Ocean Fragments, 2x Petal Fragments, 2x Phantom Fragments, 2x Holy Fragments, 5,000x Gems, 1x Secret Shard
150x Trait Rerolls, 50x Demon Orbs, 5,000x Gems, Random Unit reward
100x Trait Rerolls, 50,000x Gold, 25x Relic Rerolls, 35x Stat Rerolls; level 10 required
5,000x Gems, 100x Devil Orbs, 50x Trait Rerolls; level 15 required

data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem Universal Tower Defense X codes, open the in-game code redemption menu, enter the promo code exactly as shown, and redeem it. Some codes require a minimum player level before rewards can be claimed.

data.name: Survive Zombie Arena
data.description: Get more Credits with these active SZA codes and level up your survival experience.
data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem Survive Zombie Arena codes, open the in-game code redemption area, enter the code into the text field, and submit it to claim free Credits.

data.name: Volleyball Legends
data.description: Codes for Volleyball Legends add Lucky Spins to your account for fresh Styles, Abilities, and more.
data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem Volleyball Legends codes, open the Shop menu, find the Codes section, type or paste the active code into the redemption box, and redeem it to receive Lucky Spins.

data.name: Blue Lock Rivals
data.description: BLR codes give extra Lucky Spins, but users need to meet several requirements before redeeming.

list_code.description_code: 5 Lucky Style Spins, 5 Lucky Flow Spins

data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem Blue Lock Rivals codes, open the in-game code redemption menu, enter the code exactly as shown, and submit it. Some codes require the player to meet account, group, or level requirements.

data.name: Basketball Zero
data.description: Codes for Basketball Zero add extra Lucky Spins and rewards, with no level requirements for redeeming.

list_code.description_code: 20,000 Money, 15 Lucky Style Spins, 15 Lucky Zone Spins, 1,000 Keys
50,000 Money, 20 Lucky Style Spins, 20 Lucky Zone Spins, 2,500 Keys; requires 30 mins in-game
1,000,000 Money, 50 Lucky Style Spins, 50 Lucky Zone Spins, 2,500 Keys

data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem Basketball Zero codes, open the Codes option in the game, enter the active promo code, and redeem it to receive Money, Lucky Style Spins, Lucky Zone Spins, Keys, or other rewards.

data.name: Slime Seas
data.description: Slime Seas codes can boost Slay a Slime power and provide valuable items.

list_code.description_code: Greater Luck 30 mins, Greater Gold Potion 30 mins, new title
Superior Exp boost 30 mins, 2x Race Rerolls
Greater Power boost 30 mins, Greater Luck boost 30 mins

data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem Slime Seas codes, open the in-game code redemption section, enter the code exactly as written, and submit it to claim boosts, rerolls, titles, or other rewards.

data.name: Restaurant Tycoon 3
data.description: Codes for Restaurant Tycoon 3 provide in-game currency to help expand a catering empire.

list_code.description_code: janisjanis01 Trophy, janisjanis01 Poster, janisjanis01 Statue
FULMOON Trophy, FULMOON Poster, FULMOON Statue
Photon Trophy, Photon Poster, Photon Statue

data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem Restaurant Tycoon 3 codes, open the in-game menu or shop area, find the code redemption box, enter the code, and redeem it to receive Cash, Diamonds, or cosmetic trophy rewards.

data.name: Re Rangers X
data.description: Re Rangers X codes provide resources such as trait rerolls, Gems, Keys, and units.

list_code.description_code: 130x Trait Rerolls, 6,000x Anniversary Coins, 50x Sun Universe, 50x Moon Universe, 50x All Universes; requires level 15
55 Trait Rerolls, 1,500 Anniversary Coins, 5 Soul Fragments, 5 Dr. Megga Punk; requires level 20
25x Trait Rerolls, 900x Anniversary Coins, 10x Stat Boosters, 20x Soul Fragments, 10x Dr. Megga Punk, 15x All Universes; requires level 15
5x Dr. Megga Punk, 10,000x Gems, 300x Anniversary Coins, 2x Stat Boosters, 20x Trait Rerolls; requires level 5
10x Dr. Megga Punk, 300x Anniversary Coins, 15x Soul Fragments, 3x Stat Boosters, 20x Trait Rerolls; requires level 5

data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem Re Rangers X codes, open the code redemption option in-game, enter the promo exactly as shown, and redeem it. Several codes require a minimum level before the rewards can be claimed.

data.name: Project Mirror Labyrinth
data.description: Project Mirror Labyrinth codes grant Fragments and occasional other rewards for pulling new outfits.
data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem Project Mirror Labyrinth codes, open the in-game code redemption menu, enter the active promo code, and submit it to claim Fragments, Points, tickets, or other rewards.

data.name: Playground Basketball
data.description: Codes for Playground Basketball boost Coins balance so players can purchase fresh cosmetics.
data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem Playground Basketball codes, open the code redemption section inside the game, type the promo code into the code box, and redeem it to add Coins to your balance.

data.name: Paradox
data.description: Codes for Paradox provide rerolls for ability, clan, weapon skin, stat resets, and wipe essence.

list_code.description_code: 25 Weapon Skin Rerolls, 25 Clan Rerolls, 2 Stat Rerolls
25 Locked Ability Rerolls, 25 Locked Weapon Skin Rerolls, 25 Locked Clan Rerolls
30 Ability Rerolls, 10 Clan Rerolls, 10 Weapon Skin Rerolls

data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem Paradox codes, open the in-game code redemption option, enter the code exactly as shown, and submit it to claim rerolls, stat resets, wipe essence, or other rewards.

data.name: Sorcerer Incremental
data.description: These Sorcerer Incremental codes grant imagination boosting rewards in the text-based Roblox experience.

list_code.description_code: 25 Energy Scrolls, 75 Technique Rolls, 25 Clan Scrolls, 75 Weapon Rolls
15 Energy Scrolls, 50 Technique Rolls, 15 Clan Scrolls, 50 Weapon Rolls
10 Energy Scrolls, 25 Technique Rolls, 10 Clan Scrolls, 25 Weapon Rolls

data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem Sorcerer Incremental codes, first like the game and join the Blumea Productions group on Roblox. Then, in-game, click the three dots in the top right corner to open the full menu, click Codes at the bottom, enter the code into the box, and hit Redeem.

data.name: AOTR
data.description: Use these Attack on Titan Revolution codes to get a bunch of useful rewards and help you defeat Titans.

list_code.description_code: 300x spins, Double Luck Potion, Double Gold Potion, Double XP Potion, 10x Emperor Keys
250x spins, Double Luck Potion, Double Gold Potion, Double XP Potion, 15x Emperor Keys; requires Prestige 1
500x spins, Double Luck Potion, Double Gold Potion, Double XP Potion, 20x Emperor Keys, 1,400x Shards, 2,000 Canes; requires Prestige 1
100x spins, Double Luck Potion, Double Gold Potion, Double XP Potion, 5x Emperor Keys, 2,000x Gems; requires level 25

data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem AOTR codes, launch the game and select your save slot. Click the Codes button from the main menu, enter your code into the box in the bottom right-hand corner, then hit Redeem to claim the rewards.

data.name: Sailor Piece
data.description: Redeem the latest Sailor Piece codes when you need cash for weapons and to reroll your stats.
data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem Sailor Piece codes, launch the game on Roblox, click the settings button in the top right-hand corner, scroll to the bottom of the settings menu, enter the code into the redemption box, then press Redeem. Some codes require specific player levels.

data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem Jujutsu Shenanigans codes, launch the shop screen by clicking the Shop icon in the top-left corner of the screen. Click the Codes tab on the right, enter the code, then click Redeem.

data.name: Hunty Zombie
data.description: Codes for Hunty Zombie can help you reroll for new traits, as well as spinning fresh perks and weapons.

list_code.description_code: 75 Lucky Weapon Spins, 75 Lucky Perk Spins
70 Lucky Weapon Spins, 70 Lucky Perk Spins, 15 Traits
35 Lucky Weapon Spins, 35 Lucky Perk Spins, 25 Traits
70 Lucky Weapon Spins, 70 Lucky Perk Spins, 20 Traits
100 Lucky Weapon Spins, 100 Lucky Perk Spins, 35 Traits

data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem Hunty Zombie codes, first reach Level 5 or above. Then hit the CODES book icon at the top of the right-hand stack to open the SHOP menu, enter the code in the Enter code here... text box, and press CONFIRM. Codes are case-sensitive.

data.name: Hitman Card Game
data.description: Codes for Hitman Card Game will let you up the ante with cash and tokens to spend, along with banners, charms, and card sleeves.

list_code.description_code: $3,000, 25x Mutation Token (Green), 25x Prismatic Token (Red), 25x Mosaic Token (Blue), 25x Holo Token (Purple)

data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem Hitman Card Game codes, open SHOP from the main menu, then scroll to the bottom or use the SECRET CODES side-menu option. Enter the promo in the SECRETCODE123 text box. Codes are not case-sensitive.

data.name: Grow a Garden
data.description: The current crop of Grow a Garden codes will add a selection of cosmetic items to your harvesting set up.
data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem Grow a Garden codes, hit the Cog icon at the top of the screen to open Settings, scroll down to Redeem Codes, type the code into the box, then use the Claim button. A message will confirm whether redemption was successful.

data.name: Garden Horizons
data.description: Codes for Garden Horizons will give you cash to spend and a selection of seeds to sow, including an exclusive Dawnfruit Seed.
data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem Garden Horizons codes, tap the Cog icon at the top of the screen to open Settings, scroll to the bottom, find the Codes option, enter the code in the Enter Code... text box, then hit return or the > icon. Codes are not case-sensitive.

data.name: Fish It
data.description: Codes for Fish It will give you free Potions and items, which will help to improve your angling experience.

list_code.description_code: 2x Luck II Potion, 1x Carrot I Potion

data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem Fish It codes, hit the Shopping Basket icon at the top of the screen to open the Store menu, scroll to the bottom to find the ENTER CODE! text box, type the code in all-caps, then hit REDEEM. You must be at least Level 11 before redeeming codes.

data.name: Untitled Boxing Game
data.description: Redeem the latest Untitled Boxing Game codes if you're saving up for a cool new Knockdown or want to change your Fighting Style.
data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem Untitled Boxing Game codes, launch the game. No tutorial is required. As long as you are not in a fight, click the Codes button on the left-hand side of the screen, enter the code into the box, and click Redeem.

data.name: Devil Hunter
data.description: Codes for Devil Hunter give you Fiend Rerolls, Clan Rerolls, Eraser Devils, and Yen so you can stock up on rewards.

list_code.description_code: 18x Fiend Reroll, 8x Clan Reroll, 5x Haircolor Reroll, 5x Eyecolor Reroll, 1x Eraser Devil; must be at least First Class Hunter
Rewards; must be at least First Class Hunter
Rewards; must be at least First Class Hunter
Rewards; must be at least First Class Hunter
Rerolls; must be at least First Class Hunter
Rerolls; must be at least First Class Hunter

data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem Devil Hunter codes, join the Devil Hunter May Cry developer group, complete The Induction tutorial, and report back to Kintoki to unlock your in-game phone. Open the phone, tap the Codes icon, enter the promo in the Enter code... text box, and press Enter. Codes are case-sensitive.

data.name: Detonate
data.description: Codes for Detonate can be redeemed for regular and Lucky Spins, which unlock new abilities to use on the battleground.
data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem Detonate codes, tap the Codes gift icon at the end of the bottom row on screen. Enter the promo in the Code here... text box, then hit Redeem! A notification will confirm if it worked, though it may not show what reward was earned.

data.name: Combat Arena
data.description: These Combat Arena codes can grant cool skins for your weapons, but also coins for buying new, more powerful ones.
data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem Combat Arena codes, first complete the tutorial. Then open the Rewards tab of the main menu, click Redeem Code in the top right-hand corner, enter the code, and hit Redeem. Cash is added to the total, while crates appear in the Crates tab.

data.name: Brainrot Evolution
data.description: Codes for Brainrot Evolution can be redeemed for Experience Potions to level up faster and Crates that unlock Relics.
data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem Brainrot Evolution codes, open the Shop by hitting the icon on the left-hand side of the screen, scroll to the bottom of the Shop menu, enter the promo in the Enter Code text box, and hit Verify. Codes are not case-sensitive.

data.name: Berry Avenue
data.description: Codes for Berry Avenue will add plenty of new looks to your wardrobe, so you can stand out in this RP experience.

list_code.description_code: Julia, It Girl with Piercing face

data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem Berry Avenue codes, tap the arrow on the right side of the screen, choose AVATAR, hit MENU at the top, choose Equipped, then hit IMPORT ID. Enter the numerical code in the IMPORT ITEM ID text box.

data.name: Azure Latch
data.description: Get the latest Azure Latch codes for cash and style coins to spend on emotes, finishers, and more.
data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem Azure Latch codes, launch the game, hit the Menu button at the bottom of the screen, open the Rewards tab, enter the code into the box, and hit Redeem. You must first join the Azure Latch Team community on Roblox and like the game.

data.name: Anime Last Stand
data.description: ALS codes can be used to claim in-game currencies, both regular and for seasonal events.

list_code.description_code: 100x Technique Crystals, 25x Stat Prisms, 25x Perfect Stat Prisms, 5,000x Diamonds

data.description_guide_add_code: Before redeeming Anime Last Stand codes, join the [B:S] ALS Team Community. Then tap the Codes gift icon at the bottom of the right-hand stack, enter the active promo in the Enter Code... prompt, and submit it. Codes are case-sensitive and punctuation must match.

data.name: Anime Fighting Simulator: Endless
data.description: These Anime Fighting Simulator Endless codes will give you lots of free Chikara and Yen, plus boosts for days.
data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem Anime Fighting Simulator Endless codes, tap the purple Discord icon on the left-hand side of the screen. You may need to press the up or down arrow to cycle through options. This opens the Codes screen, where you can enter the promo in the [CODE HERE] text box. Codes are case-sensitive.

data.name: Anime Eternal
data.description: There are many codes for Anime Eternal that you can redeem right now to stock up on Credits, Potions, Crystals, and other resources.
data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem Anime Eternal codes, tap the Shop basket icon on the left side of the screen, scroll down the Shop menu to the Redeem Codes section at the bottom, enter the promo, and hit Redeem. Codes are not case-sensitive, but punctuation must be included where shown.

data.name: Anime Defenders
data.description: Redeem these Anime Defenders codes in Roblox and stock up on resources to aid your tower defense.
data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem Anime Defenders codes, join a session, select the '...' button at the top of the screen, then choose Codes from the menu. Enter the promo in the Enter Code Here box and press the blue Redeem button. Your character must be Level 8 and your account must be 90 days old.

data.name: Abyss
data.description: Codes for Abyss will help you in this deep sea fishing adventure, with Star Shards to spend on Rerolls and various boosts.
data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem Abyss codes, complete the tutorial by introducing yourself to the Kraken and catching three fish. Then tap the Cog icon near the top left, scroll down to the Codes section, enter the promo in the Enter code... text box, and hit the green Redeem button.

data.name: Wanted
data.description: Codes for Wanted will give your bank balance a boost and equip you with several new weapons.
data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem Wanted codes, first join the official Discord server and use Bloxlink verification to link your account. Then hit MENU in-game, select the SHOP tab, go to the CODES section, and type the promos into the text box.

data.name: Soccer Zero
data.description: Codes for Soccer Zero are now available as the game has launched, and this is how to redeem them.
data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem Soccer Zero codes, hit the purple gift Codes icon along the bottom row of options on the main game screen. Enter the promo in the text box. You must join developer Current's Roblox group to use the codes.

data.name: My Knife Farm
data.description: Now buying and selling knives is a top Roblox game, you're going to need these My Knife Farm codes to level up your own plot.
data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem My Knife Farm codes, click the cog icon at the top-right corner of the screen, enter the code in the redemption box, and hit Redeem. You can redeem codes as soon as you load the experience, without joining a group or liking the game.

data.name: Midnight Chasers
data.description: Codes for Midnight Chasers will give your bank balance a significant cash injection so you can buy new vehicles to race.
data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem Midnight Chasers codes, tap the Store icon on the left side of the screen, open the Shop menu, then hit the Codes button on the far right. Enter the code in the Enter a Code... text box and hit Redeem. Codes are case-sensitive.

data.name: Locked 2
data.description: Redeem these Locked 2 codes for thousands of free Yen to spend in-game on maps, emotes, and more.
data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem Locked 2 codes, complete the brief tutorial first. Then open the menu with the M button, click Store, open the Codes tab, enter the code into the box, and hit Redeem.

data.name: Roblox Knockout
data.description: Codes for Knockout in Roblox will boost your Ice balance to unlock new skins and give Spins to win prizes.
data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem Roblox Knockout codes, open the in-game code redemption menu, enter the promo code exactly as shown, and redeem it to receive Ice, Spins, or other rewards.

data.name: Invincible Showdown
data.description: Redeem the latest Invincible Showdown codes to earn free bonuses in the comic-inspired game.
data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem Invincible Showdown codes, open the in-game code redemption option, enter the active promo code, and submit it to claim free Cash.

data.name: Fix It Up
data.description: Fix It Up codes will help you build up your garage business by giving cash to buy wrecked cars, parts, and upgrades.
data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem Fix It Up codes, open the in-game code redemption section, enter the active promo code, and redeem it to add Euro cash to your account.

data.name: Evade
data.description: Evade codes can give a boost in the parkour horror game, including Points and cosmetic rewards.
data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem Evade codes, open the in-game code redemption menu, enter the active code into the text box, and submit it to claim Points or cosmetic rewards.

data.name: Elementalism
data.description: Elementalism codes help you develop mastery and spirituality, while also giving Aureus, trait rolls, and accessories.
data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem Elementalism codes, open the game menu, find the code redemption option, enter the promo code exactly as shown, and redeem it to receive Aureus, trait rolls, mastery, spirituality, or accessories.

data.name: Dungeon Heroes
data.description: Dungeon Heroes codes offer foods, potions, XP boosters, key boosters, and other rewards to help with dungeon progression.

list_code.description_code: 12h XP Booster, 12h Key Booster, 4x 6h Magic Dust Booster

data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem Dungeon Heroes codes, open the in-game codes menu, enter the promo code, and submit it to receive food, potions, boosters, or other dungeon rewards.

data.name: Dueling Grounds
data.description: Dueling Grounds codes give free Coins and Gems to buy weapons and unlock skins.
data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem Dueling Grounds codes, open the in-game code redemption menu, enter the active code into the code box, and redeem it to receive Coins and Gems.

data.name: Demon Blade
data.description: Demon Blade codes provide Cash, Race Spins, stat resets, and other rewards for the action RPG experience.
data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem Demon Blade codes, open the in-game code redemption section, enter the promo code exactly as shown, and redeem it to claim Cash, Race Spins, stat resets, Souls, or other rewards.

data.name: Chainsaw Man Incremental
data.description: Chainsaw Man Incremental codes give rerolls for devil or contract, clan, trait, style, and other stats.

list_code.description_code: 100x Devil/Contract rerolls, 100x Clan rerolls, 100x Trait rerolls, 100x Style rerolls
67x Devil/Contract rerolls, 67x Clan rerolls, 67x Trait rerolls, 67x Style rerolls
10x Devil/Contract rerolls, 10x Clan rerolls, 10x Trait rerolls, 10x Style rerolls
10x Devil/Contract rerolls, 10x Clan rerolls, 10x Trait rerolls, 10x Style rerolls

data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem Chainsaw Man Incremental codes, open the in-game code redemption menu, enter the promo code, and redeem it to claim rerolls for devil or contract, clan, trait, style, or other stats.

data.name: Brookhaven
data.description: Brookhaven codes are mainly used to access music tracks and meme sounds inside the Roblox experience.
data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem Brookhaven music codes, open the in-game music or audio option, enter the numerical asset ID, and play it in the experience. These are music track IDs rather than standard reward codes.

data.name: Blox Fruits
data.description: Blox Fruits codes give XP boosts, small amounts of money, stat refunds, and in-game titles.
data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem Blox Fruits codes, launch the game, click the blue gift icon or codes button on the screen, enter the code in the text box, and redeem it to receive XP boosts, stat resets, money, or titles.

data.name: Black Grimoire
data.description: Black Grimoire codes grant Yules, boosts, rerolls, tokens, and useful RPG items.

list_code.description_code: 5x Grimoire Remove tokens, 5x Race Rerolls, 5x Class Rerolls, 5x Trait Rerolls
500,000 Yules, Double Yules Boost for 10 minutes

data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem Black Grimoire codes, open the in-game code redemption menu, enter the active code, and submit it to claim Yules, boosts, rerolls, tokens, or items.

data.name: Blade Ball
data.description: Blade Ball codes provide free Wheel Spins, sword skins, luck boosts, and other in-game rewards.
data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem Blade Ball codes, open the Extra menu or code redemption option in-game, enter the active promo code, and redeem it to claim Wheel Spins, sword skins, luck boosts, or other rewards.

data.name: Bee Swarm Simulator
data.description: Bee Swarm Simulator codes give Tickets, Honey, berries, boosts, field bonuses, and other hive-building items.

list_code.description_code: 1x Marshmallow Bee, 4x Strawberries, 4x Sunflower Seeds, 4x Blueberries, 4x Pineapples, 4x Micro-Converters, 4x Field Dice, 4x Gumdrops, 4x Jelly Beans, 4x Stingers
1x Marshmallow Bee, 1x Loaded Dice, Mountain Top Field Code, 3x Mountain Top Field Boost, 13x Mountain Top Field Winds
1x Red Balloon, 1x Marshmallow Bee, berries, seeds, gumdrops, field boosts, and field winds

data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem Bee Swarm Simulator codes, open the in-game settings or cog menu, find the Promo Codes text box, enter the code, and redeem it to claim Tickets, Honey, boosts, berries, field bonuses, or other items.

data.name: Be Dino
data.description: Be Dino codes provide Gems, dinosaurs, XP boosts, fossils, and growth items for the dinosaur simulation game.

list_code.description_code: 10,000 Gems, 2x Palemaw Dilophosaurus, 1x Emberjaw Tarbosaurus, 1x Dimorphodon, 1x Large XP Boost
20,000 Gems, 1x Tidefang Spinosaurus, 1x Tier 1 Medium XP Fossil, 1x Tier 1 Medium Luck Fossil

data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem Be Dino codes, open the in-game code redemption area, enter the active promo code, and redeem it to receive Gems, dinosaurs, XP boosts, fossils, growth amber, or other rewards.

data.name: Anime World Tower Defense
data.description: Anime World Tower Defense codes give Reroll Tokens, Gold, Celestial Crystals, Miracle Shards, and Puzzles.

list_code.description_code: 50x Reroll Tokens, 2,500,000x Gold, 100x Celestial Crystals, 5x Miracle Shards, 13,500x Puzzles
50x Reroll Tokens, 2,500,000x Gold, 100x Celestial Crystals, 5x Miracle Shards, 13,500x Puzzles
50x Reroll Tokens, 2,500,000x Gold, 100x Celestial Crystals, 5x Miracle Shards, 13,500x Puzzles

data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem Anime World Tower Defense codes, open the game menu, go to the code redemption section, enter the active code, and redeem it to receive Reroll Tokens, Gold, Celestial Crystals, Miracle Shards, Puzzles, or other tower defense rewards.

data.name: Anime Vanguards
data.description: Anime Vanguards codes provide Trait Rerolls, Gems, Memoria Shards, Stat Chips, and other resources to strengthen units.

list_code.description_code: 100 Trait Rerolls, 100 Memoria Shards; requires Level 30
20 Memoria Shards, 20 Stat Chips; requires Level 30

data.description_guide_add_code: To redeem Anime Vanguards codes, open the in-game code redemption menu, enter the promo code exactly as shown, and submit it. Some codes require a minimum player level before rewards can be claimed.
